column4: Verify product details are displayed correctly
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Login with valid credentials
3.Search for any product (for example: mobile)
4.Click on any product from the search results
column6:
1.Product name, price, description, and specifications should be displayed correctly
2.No missing or incorrect information
column7: System displayed correct product details without any missing information

column4: Verify product image display and zoom functionality
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Login with valid credentials
3.Search for any product (for example: mobile)
4.Click on any product to open the product details page
5.View product images
6.Tap on the image and use zoom functionality
column6:
1.Images should load properly
2.Zoom functionality should work
3.No blur or distortion
column7: Images loaded properly and zoom worked as expected
